recommendations.title: Fascists on Mars
recommendations.overview: In 1938 a group of fascists led by the general Gaetano Maria Barbagli decides to invade the planet of Mars.

recommendations.title: We Are from the Future
recommendations.overview: Four present-day Russian men dig for Nazi memorabilia at a WWII battlefield. A wormhole lake sends them back to a battle in 1942 USSR.

recommendations.title: Darkman II: The Return of Durant
recommendations.overview: Darkman and Durant return and they hate each other as much as ever. This time, Durant has plans to take over the city's drug trade using high-tech weaponry. Darkman must step in and try to stop Durant once and for all.

recommendations.title: Paradise
recommendations.overview: A man sees the dark side of the time-manipulating biotech company he works for when a crushing debt forces his wife to give up 40 years of her own life.

recommendations.title: Journey's End
recommendations.overview: Set in a dugout in Aisne in 1918, a group of British officers, led by the mentally disintegrating young officer Stanhope, variously await their fate.

recommendations.title: The Awakening
recommendations.overview: In post–War England, a writer and sometime-ghost hunter investigates a reported haunting at a boys boarding school.

recommendations.title: Lion of the Desert
recommendations.overview: Resistance leader Omar Mukhtar opposes Italian colonization before World War II. The brutal guerrilla war against Italian General Rodolfo Graziani and the Fascist forces of Benito Mussolini highlights the struggle for Libyan independence and the hars

recommendations.title: Where Eagles Dare
recommendations.overview: World War II is raging, and an American general has been captured and is being held hostage in the Schloss Adler, a Bavarian castle that's nearly impossible to breach. It's up to a group of skilled Allied soldiers to liberate the general before it's

recommendations.title: Terminal Velocity
recommendations.overview: A maverick skydiver and a former KGB agent team up to stop the Russian mafia from stealing gold.

recommendations.title: Abracadabra
recommendations.overview: A housewife struggles with her husband after he is possessed by a ghost.
